ideation: This sequence depicts a gentle, welcoming gesture, suggesting the delicate nature of a white flower. The arms extend outward in a slow, graceful movement, as if offering the flower to someone.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the peaceful and serene feeling associated with white flowers.  The sequence uses a slow, flowing motion, starting with the arms at the side, then extending them outward to full extension, before returning to a resting position. The slight variation in wrist positions adds to the natural feel of the gesture.  The overall feel should be one of gentle offering and peaceful acceptance.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, a gentle beginning
arms slowly extend outward, like petals unfurling
arms reach further, a delicate offering
arms begin to draw back inward gracefully
arms return to rest, a peaceful close
